---
name: Compliance Concern
about: Report a stale entry, missing country, or mismatched code in a policy's data file
title: '[Compliance] '
labels: ['compliance', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Policy

Which predicate does this concern? (e.g. `isOfacComprehensive`, `isUSState`)

## Change requested

What change do you believe is needed? (Add a country? Remove one? Correct a code?)

## Primary source

Link to a primary source — an OFAC press release, an EU Official Journal
notice, a UN sanctions committee announcement, or a recent-actions entry.

> Please do not link to secondary reporting (news articles summarising
> sanctions changes); link the official source itself.

URL:

## Effective date

What date would you like this change effective?

## Additional context

Anything else we should know? Time-sensitive context, business impact, etc.

---

**For compliance changes to the OFAC comprehensive embargo list (Cuba,
Iran, North Korea, Crimea, Donetsk, Luhansk), the on-call engineer will
respond within one (1) business day and the assigned compliance reviewer
will commit to a decision within five (5) business days. See the
[top-level README](../../README.md#review-sla--comprehensively-sanctioned-countries)
for the full SLA.**
